title: King Fahd University of Petroleum & Minerals AI Policy Source Report - May 2026
summary: This staged run found one official non-news KFUPM source suitable for narrow AI education and tool-access claims: the AI+X page. The staged claims describe undergraduate AI coursework and ChatGPT Edu integration exactly as supported by that source. Official news, event, research showcase, course-level PDF, and non-AI policy-index candidates were rejected and were not used for university-wide policy conclusions.
limitations: This run is a staged source-first snapshot and does not publish canonical KFUPM claims.
No public university-wide generative AI academic-integrity, privacy, procurement, or tool-use policy page was found in this run.
Course-level PDFs and event pages may describe local practices or discussions, but they were not used as university-level policy evidence.
This tracker is not legal advice, not academic integrity advice, and not an official university statement unless a linked source is the university's own official page.
sourceRightsPolicy: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.
